counterparties.name: MesiCap Technologies OÜ
counterparties.notes: The borrower — MesiCap Technologies OÜ. Three-way owned by Rain Rosimannus, Rasmus Rosimannus, Lauri Luik.

counterparties.name: Thirona Capital OÜ
counterparties.notes: Rain's holding entity. Lent to MesiCap including the back-to-back octoserver loan.

counterparties.name: SK4 HoldCo OÜ
counterparties.notes: Rain's holding entity. Lent trading capital to MesiCap.

counterparties.name: Waddy Holding OÜ
counterparties.notes: Rain's holding entity. Operational shortfall facility under master agreement 23.10.2025.

counterparties.name: Arvutitugi OÜ
counterparties.notes: Lauri's entity. Two IBANs used. Lent operational facility (matched with Waddy) and trading capital (EUR + USD).

counterparties.name: Hologram OÜ
counterparties.notes: Rasmus Rosimannus — shareholder via sweat equity. Placeholder lender entity; no loans on file. Portal access for UAT + forward compatibility if Hologram ever lends to MesiCap.

loans.description: Octoserver hardware financing — back-to-back with Thirona's bank loan
loans.collateral_description: Octoserver 4U-E10G-GENOAX2 (4U 8 GPU SERVER, PCIe 5.0X16) pledged to Thirona
loans.parent_loan_description: Funded from Thirona's bank loan at 11.337% (8.9% + 6mo Euribor 2.437%), maturing 15.10.2031. Thirona's margin: 0.213%.
loans.notes: 72 monthly installments of €577.50, total repayment €41,580. Clause 3.2 in contract references capitalizing interest but actual practice (and clause 4.1) is amortizing per installment schedule.

loans.description: Operational facility — VAT coverage and ongoing operational shortfalls
loans.notes:
Max €17,500 facility. Monthly drawdowns >= €288.75 by the 14th. 50/50 split with Arvutitugi per master agreement for operational shortfall coverage.
[STATUS] draft → active: now with agreement

loans.description: Operational facility — VAT coverage and ongoing operational shortfalls (matches Waddy)
loans.notes: Max €17,500 facility. Mirrors Waddy facility for 50/50 operational coverage. Lent via primary IBAN EE671010220061526018.

loans.description: Trading capital for Maggy & Winston testing — originally 0%, restructured to 5% on 02.05.2026
loans.notes: Originally 0% trading seed capital, €8,500. Restructured on 02.05.2026: rate changed from 0% to 5%, principal increased to €8,682.90 representing Thirona's €8,500 original plus €182.90 share of EUR premium. SK4 took the USD and AUD premium components (valued into their €3,592.13 EUR principal).

loans.description: Trading capital for Maggy & Winston testing — originally 0%, restructured to 5% on 02.05.2026
loans.notes:
Originally 0% trading seed capital. Restructured on 02.05.2026: rate changed from 0% to 5%, principal increased by allocated share of accumulated premium earned during testing period.
[2026-05-16] Updated principal_max from 3200.00 to 3592.13 per SK4 HoldCo restructured contract clause 1.1.

loans.description: Trading capital matching tranche, EUR portion
loans.notes: Lauri/Arvutitugi matching tranche (EUR) for the restructured trading capital. Funded via IBAN EE417700771001569565.

loans.description: Trading capital matching tranche, USD portion
loans.notes: Lauri/Arvutitugi matching tranche (USD) for the restructured trading capital. FX risk allocation per agreement (TODO: verify).

Premium share added to principal per restructuring (0% -> 5%). Old principal 3200.00 + premium 392.13 = new principal 3592.13 per contract clause 1.1.

Restructure: principal increased from 8500.00 to 8682.90 EUR. Thirona's share of EUR premium earned during 0% testing period. Premium amount = €11,882.90 (EUR account balance at restructure) − €3,200 (SK4's original EUR) − €8,500 (Thirona's original EUR) = €182.90.
